name: Redemption is Dead
author: Qaday
bootlegger: The Hermit does not have the Politician ability.
If an Amnesiac becomes evil after the first night, the Storyteller may choose to give them a different ability. If they do, they must inform the Amnesiac of this.
If there is more than 1 extra evil player made, then executions may fail if only evil voted. If there are more evil players than good players, executions will always fail if only evil voted.
